title: Annie Altman Files Amended Lawsuit Against Brother Sam Altman In Federal Court As Filing Revives Explosive Abuse Allegations
description: CASE AT A GLANCE A dismissed lawsuit involving one of the most powerful figures in artificial intelligence has unexpectedly been revived through a narrow legal pathway. The case now pivots on procedural law rather than factual determinations, raising critical questions about how courts handle delayed claims of childhood abuse. As the litigation moves forward, the An amended lawsuit revives allegations against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, shifting the case into a new legal phase under Missouri’s childhood sexual abuse statute.
